scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run electron"
scripts.package: npm run build && npx electron-packager . SportsVideoAnalysis --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --icon=assets/icon.icns --out=build_output --overwrite && rm -rf /Applications/SportsVideoAnalysis.app && mv build_output/SportsVideoAnalysis-darwin-arm64/SportsVideoAnalysis.app /Applications/SportsVideoAnalysis.app && rm -rf build_output/SportsVideoAnalysis-darwin-arm64
scripts.release:mac: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.release:win: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win --publish always
scripts.release:all: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --win --publish always
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:win: npm run build && npx electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npx electron-builder --mac --win --publish never
